title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for Service of Mr. Edbert L. Saberola As a Para-teacher (LEARNING SUPPORT AIDE) Assigned to Los Baños Bayog Senior High School and Bayog Elementary School with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Fifteen Thousand Pesos (P 15,000.00) Chargeable Against the Special Education Fund Effective October 17, 2022 to December 31, 2022.
